http.cookies/Morsel.name: Morsel
http.cookies/Morsel.description: Abstract a key/value pair, which has some RFC 2109 attributes. Morsels are dictionary-like objects, whose set of keys is constant — the valid RFC 2109 attributes, which are: expires¶ path¶ comment¶ domain¶ max-age secure¶ version¶ httponly¶ samesite¶ partitioned¶ The attribute httponly specifies that the cookie is only transferred in HTTP requests, and is not accessible through JavaScript. This is intended to mitigate some forms of cross-site scripting. The attribute samesite controls when th...
